stimulus: If certain amino acids such as glycine and alanine ______blank Earth from a passing comet and survived impact—an idea biochemist Renata Costa explored in a 2019 paper—the amino acids could have combined with other molecules already present on the planet to form the proteins essential to early life.
stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
rationale:
Choice D is correct. The convention being tested is the use of verbs to express tense. Because the main clause uses “could have combined” (past conditional), the if-clause requires the past perfect “had arrived” to indicate an action completed before another past action.

Choice A (present) doesn’t match the past time frame. Choice B (present progressive) doesn’t match either. Choice C (future) is inconsistent with the past conditional.
